title: rubus orthostachys
intro: Rubus orthostachys, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or the Himalayan bramble, is a species of bramble in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus orthostachys include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive problems. Rubus orthostachys can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
